message:
feat(extensions): refine flat extension initializer detection with arrow fn and quoted key support

Expand the extension discovery regex to handle additional patterns:

- Extract FLAT_EXTENSION_INITIALIZER_NAMES constant for DRY regex construction
- named_flat_extension_initializer_regex: now matches arrow function exports
  (const activate = async (pi) => {}) and variable-assigned functions
- default_object_flat_extension_initializer_regex: now matches async methods,
  arrow function values, and quoted key names (e.g., "initialize": async ...)

Updates doom-overlay test fixtures (doom-engine.ts, index.ts) to exercise
the expanded detection patterns.

Adds test discover_related_extension_entries_includes_quoted_default_object_initializer_siblings
verifying that extensions with quoted default object keys are correctly
discovered as siblings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
